hook.summary: A hand unscrews a giraffe puzzle while a narrator questions the level's design.
hook.visual_action: A hand uses a stylus to remove screws from a purple giraffe puzzle on a digital screen.
hook.voiceover_transcript: What great cleverness designed this level. It looks so easy, doesn't it?

scene_flow: Hand starts unscrewing the top parts of a giraffe puzzle using a stylus.
The narrator expresses frustration as pieces become stuck and block the path.
The hand continues to rearrange screws to try and free the remaining puzzle pieces.
The narrator issues a final challenge to the viewer to see if they can solve it.
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle gamers who are motivated by logic challenges and frustration-based marketing.
